title: Une espérance nouvelle pour le Liban
summary: Une espérance nouvelle pour le Liban (English: A New Hope for Lebanon) is a post-synodal apostolic exhortation of Pope John Paul II, signed on 10 May 1997 in Harissa-Daraoun, Lebanon. It came as the result of a synod of Lebanese Catholic bishops in Rome in November–December 1995.
text: Une espérance nouvelle pour le Liban (English: A New Hope for Lebanon) is a post-synodal apostolic exhortation of Pope John Paul II, signed on 10 May 1997 in Harissa-Daraoun, Lebanon. It came as the result of a synod of Lebanese Catholic bishops in Rome in November–December 1995.
